justification: The issue describes a problem with the conversion of NumPy masked arrays to pandas arrays, which is inconsistent with user expectations and how `pd.Series` handles similar conversions.
current_state_summary: The issue has been closed, but the problem described is still present. Related issues are marked as open and may provide additional context.

related_issues.title: BUG: DataFrame.melt silently corrupts data on var_name output-name collisions
BUG:  `read_excel` with `usecols` still mangles column names when duplicates exist elsewhere in spreadsheet
